##DESCRIPTION=Globular aggregate of thin tabular peach and white fibrous crystals

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ca_2.38_Na_1.04_K_0.09_)(Si_18.11_Al_5.89_)O_48·_11.38H_2_O ; = lighter gray phase : (Na_2.91_Ca_0.13_K_0.12_)Ca_2.00_Al_7.29_Si_28.85_O_72_·16.19H_2_O = darker gray phase = heulandite-Na
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
